creator: rjk@wintek.com
text:
I recently upgraded to 10.3-STABLE r303336, and I decided to try upgrading virtualbox to the newly committed 5.0.26 at the same time.

Hyperthreading is enabled, so FreeBSD reports having 12 cores to play with.

It now seems to work fine!

My Win7 VM (which hadn't been touched since I filed this bug report back in March) is now perfectly usable. Unless some stability issues show up (it's been running for almost 3 hours now), it looks to me like this ticket can be closed.
